from collections import namedtuple
from typing import Optional

User = namedtuple("User", ["id", "name", "email", "role", "active"])
Order = namedtuple("Order", ["id", "user_id", "amount", "status", "created_at"])

def create_user(name: str, email: str) -> User:
    return User(id=None, name=name, email=email, role="user", active=True)

def deactivate_user(user: User) -> User:
    return User(id=user.id, name=user.name, email=user.email, role=user.role, active=False)

def create_order(user_id: int, amount: float) -> Order:
    return Order(id=None, user_id=user_id, amount=amount, status="pending", created_at=None)

def update_order_status(order: Order, status: str) -> Order:
    return Order(id=order.id, user_id=order.user_id, amount=order.amount, status=status, created_at=order.created_at)

def format_user(user: User) -> str:
    return f"{user.name} <{user.email}> ({user.role})"
